candidate_summary: LLM architecture mapping Persian qanat+ab-anbar system to stacked cistern context-buffers, wind-tower thermal cross-attention, vent-shaft diagnostic readouts, and sarooj-bounded gravity residual routing.
content_words: wind tower cooling pressure differential qanat
vent shaft mother well sarooj mortar

results.name: Understanding Optimizing Multi-Stage AI Inference Pipelines HERMES MIST
results.rationale: Shares 'multi-stage' framing but targets inference pipeline scheduling, not cistern-buffer cross-attention or qanat-style gravity routing.

results.name: SAIR Cost-Efficient Multi-Stage ML Pipeline Autoscaling
results.rationale: Autoscaling ML pipelines is orthogonal to qanat-derived buffered context chambers and thermal cross-attention.

results.name: MemOS Memory OS 3-Substrate Hierarchical
results.rationale: Hierarchical memory substrate weakly analogous to stacked cisterns but lacks vent-shaft readouts, thermal damping, and gravity residual axis.

results.name: FusionCIM Computing-in-Memory LLM Inference
results.rationale: Hardware in-memory compute; no qanat cistern buffering, no impermeable boundary controlled-outlet design.

results.name: Memory Processing Pipeline Disaggregated LLM
results.rationale: Disaggregated memory pipeline is distantly related to staged buffers but does not encode wind-tower thermal cross-attention or sarooj-bounded outlets.

results.name: Unified Routing Cascading LLM ICLR 2025
results.rationale: Cascading model routing differs from per-stage cistern context-buffer chambers with attention-pooled summaries.

results.name: Impact of Temperature LLM Hot or Cold
results.rationale: Sampling temperature analysis; unrelated to thermal-damping cool-reference cross-attention reducing activation variance.

results.name: Thermal-Aware Workload Scheduler Cooling-Regulated LLM
results.rationale: Hardware thermal scheduling shares cooling motif but lacks wind-tower pressure-differential cross-attention and qanat residual routing.

decision_rationale: No prior art reaches keyword, semantic, or functional thresholds; primary scored 8 hits at sem 0.70-0.86 / func 0.72-0.88 on multi-stage-pipeline + thermal-aware adjacencies; verdict-level disagreement flagged.
